title: bye felica by Halos1
lyrics: Rooh Rooh Rooh Rooh Rooh Rooh I treat rappers like a locomotor, B***h at 2-2 Been stoned since adolescence, my eyes red as Mulciou Bye Felicia, Bye Felicia, Buit Felicia and Toururum Bloods full of Superblue, sipping cups of Superboo I treat rappers like a locomotor, B***h at 2-2 Been stoned since adolescence, my eyes red as Mulciou Bye Felicia, Bye Felicia, Buit Felicia and Toururum Bloods full of Superblue, sipping cups of Superboo I'm a B***h and damn it, full of stress that's unaddressed I always feel like last, blessed, least, best Haven't been well rested since last time I was arrested Turned this mood into compassion, hope something's impressive Though I don't feel I'm respected, demons are neglected Shadows are my best friends, they know that I'm reckless Young and got a death wish, cause if you really know me You know that I'm always lonely, you know I ain't got no homies And most of the time I'm dope sick, houseless, not homeless Hopeful, not hopeless, I'm from having scars Hatches and seals on traps and when I'm done I throw it on the ground Smoke a blue with my crew and I'm with you, that's how we do Blue money and blue thirties, blue flags, no you're not worthy Stacking while I'm cursing, I'm rapping this, I'm cursing Bulls on bulls, I'm big mess, goals, no goals for treatment I think I'm in the deep end, not the type to pretend This is how we reap men, friends fuck friends who needs them Rappers like a locomotive, picture true true Been stoned since adolescence, my eyes red as mushroom Bye Felicia, bye Felicia, bye Felicia, toodle-oo
